title: Google ML Kit
objectives: Feed camera frames into detectors efficiently

sections.markdown: Google ML Kit provides on-device ML primitives via Flutter packages (`google_mlkit_text_recognition`, `_face_detection`, `_barcode_scanning`, `_pose_detection`, `_translate`, and more) — no server calls, works offline.

On-device ML wins on privacy (data never leaves the phone), latency (no round trip), and cost (no server bills). For custom models use ML Kit's custom-model support with a TensorFlow Lite file bundled or hosted via Firebase ML.
Running ML on every camera frame → dropped frames + heat. Throttle to N frames/sec, downscale input, and reuse the detector instance (don't create per-frame).

Bundled models increase APK size but work first-launch offline; Play-services models are smaller but need a one-time download. Pick per user experience. Always `close()` detectors to free native memory.

flashcards.back: On device — no server needed; works offline.
Processing every frame + creating detector per frame — throttle + reuse instance.
Bundled: bigger APK, works day one. Play-services: smaller APK, first-launch downloads.

options: Custom .tflite via ML Kit's custom-model support
quiz.explain: You can bring your own model.

challenges.text: OCR a picked image with text_recognition.
Live face-detection preview from the camera, throttled to 15fps.
Bundle a custom .tflite model and label images with it.
Compare bundled vs Play-services model UX (APK size, first-launch).
